//fabrik:cli:command factories are registered so the generated run() dispatches
them; a factory's parameters are injected from the object graph, and a factory
with no parameters is registered directly.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

type Greeter struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewGreeter() *Greeter { return &Greeter{} }

//fabrik:cli:command
func GreetCommand(g *Greeter) *cli.Command {
	name := cli.StringArg("name").Required()
	return &cli.Command{
		Name: "greet",
		Help: "Greet someone",
		Args: cli.Args(name),
		Run:  func(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil },
	}
}

//fabrik:cli:command
func VersionCommand() *cli.Command {
	return &cli.Command{
		Name: "version",
		Help: "Print the version",
		Run:  func(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil },
	}
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	var root *cli.Command
	err := func() error {
		// Providers
		sharedGreeter := shared.NewGreeter()

		root = &cli.Command{
			Name: "app",
			Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
				shared.GreetCommand(sharedGreeter),
				shared.VersionCommand(),
			},
		}
		return nil
	}()
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			return 130
		}
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}
